name: Estelle Harris's Cobb Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 head romaine lettuce, washed and torn
3/4 pound cooked turkey breast meat, diced
12 ounces jar of oil-packed artichoke hearts, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except seeds in a large mixing bowl.
2. Toss to distribute dressing evenly throughout the salad.
3. Top with sesame seeds and sunflower seeds before serving.
